name: hash_tool
description: Compute and verify cryptographic hashes for strings and files. Supports MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, and SHA3-256. Use for file integrity verification, deduplication, and content fingerprinting.

action.description: Operation to perform. hash_string: hash a string value. hash_file: hash file contents. verify_file: check a file matches an expected hash. compare: test whether two strings or files are identical.

input.description: String to hash (for hash_string and compare actions).

input_b.description: Second string for the compare action.

file.description: Path to a file to hash (for hash_file, verify_file, compare actions).

file_b.description: Path to a second file for the compare action.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm to use. Defaults to sha256.

expected.description: Expected hash hex string for the verify_file action.

encoding.description: String encoding for hash_string. Defaults to utf-8.
